title: Ability to add comment/update bubble text when creating items or subitems via automation

posts.author: MMH (Maryam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When automations create new items or subitems, they currently generate with no update/comment history. This requires users to manually add context afterward, which is inefficient and risks missing important details. Having the option to automatically include an update/comment bubble text during creation would ensure that every task or subtask arrives with the necessary instructions, notes, or references already attached.

What are you trying to achieve

Streamline workflows, reduce manual entry, and make sure assignees always see critical context from the start.
